fiction.title: YESTERYEAR
fiction.author: Caro Claire Burke
fiction.description: Natalie Heller Mills, a privileged tradwife social media influencer, wakes up to find she is living in the comparatively difficult reality of 1855.

fiction.title: WHISTLER
fiction.author: Ann Patchett
fiction.description: Decades after their time together, a woman reconnects with her stepfather and they look back at the directions their lives have taken.

fiction.title: THE CALAMITY CLUB
fiction.author: Kathryn Stockett
fiction.description: As things get tougher during the Depression, several women look for ways to improve their circumstances.

fiction.title: THE CORRESPONDENT
fiction.author: Virginia Evans
fiction.description: Letters from someone she used to know push Sybil Van Antwerp toward revisiting her past and finding a way to forgive.

fiction.title: CARL'S DOOMSDAY SCENARIO
fiction.author: Matt Dinniman
fiction.description: The second book in the "Dungeon Crawler Carl" series. Carl and Donut confront an ancient spell and heightened dangers.

nonfiction.title: COMMUNION
nonfiction.author: JD Vance
nonfiction.description: The vice president and author of “Hillbilly Elegy” describes how he perceives his faith played a part in his work in public life.

nonfiction.title: THE LAND AND ITS PEOPLE
nonfiction.author: David Sedaris
nonfiction.description: Essays on the passage of time, complicated relationships and some unexpected delights life has to offer.

nonfiction.title: STRANGERS
nonfiction.author: Belle Burden
nonfiction.description: Burden retraces her marriage of 20 years in search of clues to help shape her understanding about its demise and to find a way forward.

nonfiction.title: STRIPPED DOWN
nonfiction.author: Bunnie Xo
nonfiction.description: The host of the “Dumb Blonde Podcast” shares how redemption was an important part of her journey toward reaching her goals.

nonfiction.title: COURAGE CAN SAVE US
nonfiction.author: Rye Barcott
nonfiction.description: Profiles of Democratic and Republican politicians who previously served in the military or the F.B.I.
